description: Craft procedures, instrument specs, ISA standards, and troubleshooting for instrumentation

isa_tag_structure.format: First letter = measured variable, remaining = function, then loop number

thermocouple_types.rule: Red is ALWAYS negative in US ANSI standard. ALWAYS use matching extension wire type.

rtd_wiring.2_wire: Least accurate — lead resistance adds error
rtd_wiring.3_wire: Most common industrial — compensates for lead resistance
rtd_wiring.4_wire: Most accurate — eliminates all lead resistance

compression_fittings.initial_makeup: 1-1/4 turns past finger tight for 1/2-inch and smaller
rules: Never use Teflon tape on compression fittings

impulse_line_routing.liquid_service: Slope DOWN from process tap to transmitter. Transmitter BELOW tap. No traps or high points.
impulse_line_routing.gas_service: Slope UP from process tap to transmitter. Transmitter ABOVE tap. No low points where liquid accumulates.
impulse_line_routing.steam_service: Install condensate pots at process connection. Fill legs with water. Both legs same length and temperature.

cable_separation.from_power_cables: 12-inch minimum in tray, separate conduit systems
cable_separation.shield_grounding: Ground at ONE end only (marshalling cabinet) to prevent ground loops
cable_separation.sis_safety: DEDICATED cable tray and conduit — never mixed with BPCS

steps: Adjust zero/span if out of tolerance

prerequisites: All wiring complete with continuity check
steps: Apply simulated input at field device
Verify signal at marshalling junction box
Verify correct reading in DCS/PLC (tag, units, range)
Command output from DCS, verify valve responds
Verify valve position feedback in DCS
For safety loops: verify shutdown activates correctly
Document all results, sign and date

orifice_plate_installation.orientation: Bevel faces DOWNSTREAM. Paddle/handle text faces UPSTREAM.
orifice_plate_installation.straight_runs: Minimum 10D upstream / 5D downstream (varies by beta ratio)
common_errors: Plate installed backwards — most common error

plugging.fix: Rod out, blow back with N2, or switch to remote seal

condensation.symptom: Reading drifts high, erratic in cold weather
condensation.fix: Install drain legs, re-slope, add heat tracing

air_locks.fix: Vent at high points, re-slope tubing

frozen.fix: Thaw carefully (heat gun, NOT flame), verify heat trace

common_mistakes.orifice_backwards: Flow reads inaccurate/low → reinstall with bevel downstream
common_mistakes.tc_wire_reversed: Temperature offset or nonlinear → replace with correct matching extension wire
common_mistakes.mag_meter_vertical_electrodes: Erratic/zero reading → rotate so electrodes are horizontal
common_mistakes.wrong_range_in_dcs: Proportional error → verify DCS range matches transmitter calibrated range

quality_common_punch_items: Tubing supports missing or exceeding max spacing
Junction box covers not installed or bolts missing
Conduit seal fittings missing in classified areas
Shields grounded at wrong end or both ends
Wrong wire type for thermocouple circuits
Calibration not performed or out of tolerance
